title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at NHB

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at NHB
jsonLd.description:
NHB, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!
